title: Kaiyil Mithakkum Song Lyrics Ratchagan
stanzas:
kaiyyil midhakkum kanavaa ne
kaikaal mulaitha kaatraa ne
kayyil yendhiyum kanakavillaye
nuraiyal seitha silaiyaa nee

ippadi unnai yaendhi kondu
indhira logam poivida vaa
idaiyil konjam vali eduthaalum
chandhira tharaiyil
paaiyidaa

kaiyyil midhakkum kanavaa ne
kaikaal mulaitha kaatraa ne
kayyil yendhiyum kanakavillaye
nuraiyal seitha silaiyaa nee

nilavil porulgal edai ilakkum
neerilum porul edai ilakkum
kadhalil kooda edai ilakkum
indru kandenadi
adhai kandu kondenadi (2)

kadhal thaaimai irandu mattum
baaram enbadhai ariyaadhu
un palingu mugathai
paarthu kondaal pasiyo
valiyo theriyaadhu (2)

unnai mattum sumandhu nadanthaal
uyaram thooram theriyaadhu(2)
unmel vandhoru oru
poo vilundhaal ennaal
thaanga mudiyaadhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaiyil Mithakkum?

The song explores themes of dreams and romance, capturing a sense of longing and beauty.

Who composed the music for Ratchagan?

The music for Ratchagan was composed by A.R. Rahman.

Who is the singer of Kaiyil Mithakkum?

The song is sung by Srinivas.

What is the release year of the movie Ratchagan?

The movie Ratchagan was released in 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaiyil Mithakkum from the movie Ratchagan is a romantic melody that captures the essence of dreams and longing. Sung by Srinivas, the song's soothing tune and poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu evoke deep emotions of love and desire. A.R. Rahman's music adds a magical touch, making it a timeless classic. The song beautifully portrays the emotional journey of the characters, resonating with anyone who has ever dreamed of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kaiyil Mithakkum from the movie Ratchagan. This song beautifully blends A.R. Rahman's soulful music with Vairamuthu's poetic lyrics, brought to life by Srinivas's captivating voice. Dive into a world of romance and dreams with this timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Are you a dream or the wind? Are you a dream, oh wind?
Are you a dream that floats in my hand? Are you the wind that grew hands and legs? Even when I hold you, you are not a dream. Are you a statue made of foam?
Come, let's go to the heavenly world, even if there's a little pain on the way, we can float on the moon.
Are you a dream that floats in my hand? Are you the wind that grew hands and legs? Even when I hold you, you are not a dream. Are you a statue made of foam?
Things move in the moonlight, things move in the water, even in love things move. Today I saw it, I saw it.
Love doesn't know that two hearts are a burden. When I look at your bright face, I don't feel hunger or pain.
When I walk carrying only you, I can't see the height or distance. If a flower falls on you, I can't bear it.
Are you a dream that floats in my hand? Are you the wind that grew hands and legs? Even when I hold you, you are not a dream. Are you a statue made of foam?
Are you a dream, oh wind? Are you a dream, oh wind?
